last_report: NBA official injury feed confirmed (30 teams) — full confidence rules apply. Two picks drafted from a 15-game slate. Key theme: multiple games disqualified due to ML odds outside 1.60–2.50 target range (many blowout-expected matchups), and several games corrupted by mass franchise player absences (CLE, HOU, LAL, MIN, NYK, OKC all missing entire cores). Best edges found: IND +13.5 at home vs locked-seed DET missing Duren (spread pick); ATL ML at 2.40 backed by extreme L15 form divergence vs confirmed-cold MIA. Two line anomalies flagged (BKN/TOR extreme ML, WAS/CLE extreme O/U, NOP/MIN extreme O/U). Pace data available this session — O/U pace signals active but no total picks cleared confidence thresholds.

draft_picks.reasoning: IND at home vs locked-seed DET missing Duren. Home team covering large spread with opponent missing key big man and lacking playoff motivation. Pacers competitive at home.
Extreme L15 form divergence between ATL and MIA. MIA confirmed cold, ATL showing positive momentum. ML odds at 2.40 within target range. Value edge on Hawks outright win.

settled_bets.match: Atlanta Hawks vs New York Knicks
settled_bets.reasoning: COMMIT REVIEW — CONFIRMED. Scout odds 2.02, commit odds 2.00 (movement -0.02, minimal, within 0.10 threshold). Anchor players Brunson, KAT, Bridges all active (not listed on injury report). ATL injury update: only RayJ Dennis Questionable (G League Two-Way — irrelevant to thesis). Core thesis intact: NYK season NetRtg +6.6 vs ATL +2.6 (4.0-pt gap in NYK's favour). ATL L10 hot streak fade signal valid (8-2 L10 but 45-33 season record vs NYK 50-28). NYK better season record, better NetRtg, healthy franchise players. ATL's surge (L15 +36.6) flagged but regression-fade at 2.00 still strong value. EV recalculated at commit odds: EV = (0.72 × 2.00) - 1 = 0.44. Well above 0.05 threshold. Odds 2.00 within ML range (1.65-2.50). Confidence 72 (High tier) unchanged. Stake maintained at €150 (15% — conservative within High tier due to ATL home court and L15 surge counter-signal).

settled_bets.match: Denver Nuggets vs Portland Trail Blazers
settled_bets.reasoning: COMMIT REVIEW — CONFIRMED at current line. Scout drafted DEN -8.5 at 1.94. Current market: DEN -8.0 at 1.95. Spread compressed 0.5 pts (slight adjustment against DEN spread), but odds improved +0.01 to 1.95. Anchor check: Jokic, Murray, MPJ all active (none listed on injury report). POR injury update confirms thesis: Damian Lillard OUT (injury management confirmed by NBA official), Jerami Grant OUT (right calf), Shaedon Sharpe OUT (reaction), Vit Krejci OUT. POR missing four key contributors including franchise player Lillard. DEN core intact with Jokic (presumed available), home court advantage at Ball Arena, W8 streak, 9-1 L10. Season NetRtg gap: DEN +4.8 vs POR -0.4 = 5.2 pts in DEN's favour. Counter-signal noted: POR L15 +46.2 is anomalously high but roster tonight is severely depleted — L15 figure does not reflect tonight's deployment. At -8.0 (easier cover than -8.5), the pick retains strong value. EV = (0.68 × 1.95) - 1 = 0.326. Spread odds 1.95 within target (1.80-2.30). Confidence 68 (Medium tier) unchanged. Stake €150 maintained.

LATE PICK — ADDED AT COMMIT. Scout noted this game and drafted SAS -8.5 at 1.90 but it was not included in final draft picks for commit review. Re-evaluated at commit time. TIME GATE: Game at 00:00 UTC, commit at 22:27 UTC = 93 min > 20 min ✅. ODDS GATE: SAS -8.5 at 1.89. Within spread target 1.80-2.30 ✅. QUANTITY GATE: First and only new pick at commit phase ✅. LINE MOVEMENT: Scout had 1.90, now 1.89 — movement of -0.01, negligible. INJURY CHECK (NBA Official): SAS injury report shows only Harrison Ingram Out (G League), David Jones Garcia Out (ankle surgery), Emanuel Miller Out (G League) — no franchise-level absences. PHI: Johni Broome Out (recovery), Cameron Payne Out (strain) — no franchise-level absences. SAS anchor players (Wembanyama, Castle, Vassell) not listed = active. THESIS: SAS L15 +48.9 (elite, top of entire league). Season NetRtg +8.2 vs PHI -0.2 = 8.4-pt gap. SAS record 59-19 vs PHI 43-35. SAS L10 9-1 vs PHI 6-4. SAS home at Frost Bank Center. PHI L15 +11.9 is decent but SAS form is genuinely elite — record validates this is not a misleading hot streak on a mediocre team (59-19 is a top-tier record). CONFIDENCE: Base 65 (SAS clearly superior team, home, elite form) + 5 (PHI depleted: Broome, Payne out) = 70. EV = (0.70 × 1.89) - 1 = 1.323 - 1 = 0.323 ≥ 0.05 ✅. STAKE: Confidence 70 = High tier (70-84) = 20-25% of €1,000. Use 20% = €200. Total committed stake after all picks: €150 + €150 + €200 = €500 = 50% of bankroll ≤ 70% ✅.

settled_bets.match: Los Angeles Lakers vs Oklahoma City Thunder
settled_bets.reasoning: Late-breaking trigger: LeBron James confirmed OUT (Management) at commit time — was Questionable/GTD at Scout. Combined with Luka Doncic OUT, Austin Reaves OUT, Marcus Smart OUT, the Lakers are playing with a skeleton roster of reserves. OKC (62-16) has SGA healthy and a full squad minus Jalen Williams — still elite. OKC L15 NetRtg: +48.0 vs LAL L15: +3.8 — gap of +44.2. Line moved from +16.5 to +18.5 as LeBron OUT was confirmed; movement is fully explained by the injury news. OKC -18.5 at 1.92 represents genuine value against a decimated opponent. EV = (0.62 × 1.92) - 1 = 0.1904.

LATE SCOUT PICK — NEW EDGE SINCE 14:00. STEP 0 — LINE ANOMALY CHECK: PHX ML 1.16 (outside range), DAL ML 6.39 (outside range). PHX spread -12.5 at 1.99 is within valid spread range (1.75-2.30). No anomaly on spread line. STEP 1 — INJURY TRIGGER: Since Scout, official injury report confirms DAL missing: Kyrie Irving OUT (Left Knee Surgery — franchise player), Dereck Lively II OUT (Right Foot Surgery — key big), plus Klay Thompson Doubtful (Rest), Caleb Martin Doubtful (Strain), Naji Marshall Doubtful (Hip), Daniel Gafford Doubtful (Impingement). DAL is operating with a skeleton crew — essentially no reliable rotation. STEP 2 — NETRTG ANALYSIS: PHX L15 +8.6 vs DAL L15 -29.3 — gap of 37.9 points. Season NetRtg: PHX +1.4 vs DAL -5.6. PHX trending upward; DAL in a steep decline with a depleted roster. STEP 3 — FORM: PHX L10 4-6 is a cold stretch concern (Scout previously flagged this), but the absence of virtually all DAL key players overrides form concerns for spread purposes. DAL L10 2-8. STEP 4 — PHX KEY PLAYERS: Kevin Durant and Devin Booker NOT on injury report (active). Grayson Allen Questionable (Contusion — role player, not franchise, standard -5% stake adjustment not required). Mark Williams OUT and Highsmith OUT (Management — not key to PHX spread). PHX core intact. STEP 5 — SPREAD EVALUATION: PHX -12.5 at home. With DAL missing Kyrie (their best player) and multiple other key contributors Doubtful/Out, a 12.5-pt home win is achievable for PHX. PHX season NetRtg advantage (+1.4 vs -5.6 = 7.0 pts season), L15 gap (+37.9 pts), and home court (~3 pts) support the spread. STEP 6 — CONFIDENCE: Base 65 (strong matchup edge with depleted DAL), -3 for PHX L10 cold form concern = 62. EV = (0.62 × 1.99) - 1 = 1.2338 - 1 = 0.234. STEP 7 — ODDS VALIDATION: 1.99 within spread range (1.75-2.30). EV 0.234 >> 0.05 threshold. STEP 8 — STAKING: Confidence 62 = Medium tier (15-20%). 15% of €1,339 = €200.85, rounded to €200. Total exposure: 14.9% of bankroll — well within 70% limit. Late scout quantity gate: this is pick 1 of max 1 allowed.

CONFIRMED from draft nba_draft_20260409_003 with minor odds drift of -0.04 (2.0 → 1.96). Odds remain within spread target range 1.80–2.30 (above 1.75 commit floor). EV recalc at 1.96: (0.68 × 1.96) - 1 = 0.3328 = +33.3%, well above 0.05 minimum. Washington is 17-62, L10 1-9, confirmed tanking team. Official injury report confirms Washington missing Bilal Coulibaly OUT (Bursitis), Anthony Davis OUT (Left Finger Sprain), Kyshawn George OUT (Left Elbow Sprain). Note: Trae Young and Alex Sarr not listed in current official report — may be available. Even so, Washington is a full tank-tier team with extreme roster depletion. L15 NetRtg gap: WAS -39.5 vs CHI -32.8 = 6.7 point gap (above 6-point threshold per skills file spread rules). Chicago anchor players Coby White, Nikola Vucevic, Patrick Williams all confirmed available (not listed in injury report). Chicago missing Buzelis, Collins, Essengue, Giddey, Okoro, Richards — but still far superior roster vs Washington. Skills: Tank team as large underdog — tankers don't cover spreads. Spread confidence floor 60 met (68 ≥ 60). Stake: Medium tier (55-69) = 15% × €1139 = €171.

LATE SCOUT PICK — New information since 14:00 Scout: Joel Embiid confirmed OUT (Illness) per NBA official injury report. Embiid is Philadelphia's franchise player and primary offensive engine. This dramatically weakens PHI's ability to cover a -6.5 spread on the road. PHI also missing Johni Broome OUT (Recovery) and Cameron Payne OUT (Strain). Houston is home, 50-29, L10 8-2, L15 NetRtg +39.9 (elite). Houston anchors Jalen Green, Alperen Sengun, Dillon Brooks all available. PHI L15 +4.9 vs HOU L15 +39.9 — 35-point gap. PHI season NetRtg -0.4 (negative, regression candidate); without Embiid this worsens substantially. Houston 7-game win streak context. Houston DefRtg 113.3 vs PHI OffRtg 115.7 — PHI's offense collapses without Embiid. LINE MOVEMENT EXPLANATION: HOU ML moved 1.60 → 1.43 confirming books also priced in Embiid's absence; spread 1.98 represents value as market hasn't fully re-priced spread relative to ML move. ODDS VALIDATION: 1.98 within spread target 1.80–2.30 (above 1.75 commit floor) ✓. EV = (0.72 × 1.98) - 1 = 1.4256 - 1 = 0.4256 = +42.6% ✓. Confidence 72 ≥ 60 gate ✓. Time gate: 00:00Z is ~86 min away (> 20 min) ✓. Quantity gate: this is the 1 allowed new pick at Commit phase ✓. Stake: High tier (70-84) = 20% × €1139 = €227.80 → €228.

Late scout pick. HOU (51-29, L10: 8-2, W8 streak, NetRtg L15: +39.0) is dominant at home vs MIN (47-33, L10: 4-6, NetRtg L15: -4.6). NetRtg gap of 43.6 points in HOU's favour is the primary signal. HOU on an 8-game winning streak with elite home form. MIN's Anthony Edwards listed Questionable (Maintenance) — franchise player rules applied: confidence -10, stake -20%. Edge exists regardless of Edwards presence given the enormous L15 form gap. HOU missing Adams (OUT) and VanVleet (OUT) but these were factored into the base confidence. Spread of -8.5 at 1.85 is within valid range. EV = 0.11 at adjusted confidence 60. Injury source nba_official, no data quality concerns.

rejected_games.reason: BOS ML at 7.03 outside range 1.60-2.50; ORL ML at 1.14 outside range. BOS L15 +33.3 vs ORL L15 -3.1 — BOS genuinely superior but Tatum OUT, Brown OUT, Hauser Doubtful, Pritchard Doubtful, Vucevic Doubtful. BOS depleted roster makes any ML unreliable. ORL spread +12.5 at 2.04: ORL L15 -3.1, below-average recent form; no edge fading BOS spread when BOS roster is uncertain. No reliable pick available.

WAS confirmed full tank — Do NOT bet WAS to win. CLE ML 1.22 outside ML target range 1.60-2.50. CLE spread -9.5 at 1.88: CLE has Mitchell, Allen, Mobley, Harden all OUT — virtually entire core absent. CLE L15 -0.3 reflects depleted roster. O/U 245.5 shows extreme pricing (O:3.46/U:1.37) — anomalous line, avoid. No pick available.

rejected_games.match: Madison Square Garden vs Charlotte Hornets
rejected_games.reason: NYK ML 6.75 — all franchise players (Brunson, Towns, Anunoby, Hart) confirmed OUT via NBA official. NYK is severely depleted. CHO ML 1.15 outside target range 1.60-2.50. CHO spread -13.5 at 1.88 is within range but CHO L15 +26.5 vs NYK L15 +13.6 — gap of 13 pts favours CHO, but CHO is on a 2-game losing streak and 1.88 is below spread floor of 1.80 (exactly at boundary). NYK without stars makes this unusual — books pricing 13.5 spread with NYK fully gutted. No reliable ML pick. Spread insufficient confidence given CHO recent streak concern.

rejected_games.match: Xfinity Mobile Arena vs Milwaukee Bucks
rejected_games.reason: PHI ML 1.11 — outside target range 1.60-2.50. PHI lacks Joel Embiid (OUT) and Johni Broome (OUT). MIL missing Giannis (OUT hyperextension), Kuzma (OUT), Porter Jr (OUT), Portis (OUT) — MIL franchise player absent and team confirmed tank-watch. MIL ML 8.60 — extreme odds reflect gutted roster. No reliable edge on either side.

TOR ML 1.01 / BKN ML 32.0 — extreme line anomaly. TOR -23.5 spread at 1.95 within range but 23.5-point spread is too extreme to forecast reliably. BKN confirmed tank team (L15 -32.3) but extreme spreads carry unpredictable cover risk. Flagging ML as anomaly; spread not drafted due to extreme margin uncertainty.

rejected_games.match: American Airlines Center vs Chicago Bulls
rejected_games.reason: DAL ML 1.42 — outside target range 1.60-2.50. CHI ML 3.15 — within range. CHI L15 -36.7 vs DAL L15 -30.4 — both teams are bad in recent form; neither offers a positive edge. CHI confirmed tank-watch (31-50, L10 2-8). DAL confirmed tank (25-56). Multiple CHI players OUT (Buzelis, Collins, Giddey, Okoro, Richards). DAL missing Kyrie Irving, Lively, several Doubtfuls. No reliable edge betting on either tanking team.

HOU ML 1.14 — outside target range. MEM ML 7.07 — extreme. MEM confirmed tank (25-56, L10 1-9, L15 -56.4). HOU missing Durant, Sengun, VanVleet, Adams, Thompson, Smith Jr. — franchise duo absent. HOU L15 +33.9 but that is with a depleted roster signal. No reliable spread edge: HOU -12.5 at 1.88 with HOU fully depleted but MEM in extreme tank. Spread unreliable with multiple unknown starters.

rejected_games.match: Target Center vs New Orleans Pelicans
rejected_games.reason: MIN ML 1.39 — outside target range. NOP ML 3.31 — within range. MIN missing Edwards, Gobert, Randle, Conley, Dosunmu, Anderson, Hyland (all OUT) — virtually entire core absent. MIN L15 -2.9 reflects depleted state. NOP ML 3.31 vs a MIN without stars is interesting, but NOP (26-55, L10 1-9, L15 -31.0) is itself a tank-tier team in terrible recent form. Betting NOP over gutted MIN is betting one tanker over another. O/U 244.5: extreme pricing (O:3.46/U:1.37) — anomalous line. No reliable edge.

OKC ML 1.45 — outside target range 1.60-2.50. PHX ML 3.02 — within range. OKC confirmed to be missing SGA, Hartenstein, Caruso (all OUT per NBA official today). OKC without SGA and Hartenstein is significantly weaker. PHX L15 -0.6 is essentially flat; season NetRtg +1.0. PHX missing Booker (OUT), Brooks (OUT), Allen (OUT) — severely depleted. L15 OKC +42.8 vs PHX -0.6 even without stars shows OKC depth. PHX ML at 3.02 is tempting but PHX is also missing key players. Confidence insufficient to back PHX at 3.02 against even a depleted OKC with elite depth.

rejected_games.match: Frost Bank Center vs Denver Nuggets
rejected_games.reason: SAS ML 1.22 — outside target range. DEN ML 4.98 — within range. DEN L15 +30.1 and on W11 streak (53-28 overall). SAS L15 +46.2 — elite recent form and home. Victor Wembanyama Questionable (rib soreness) — FRANCHISE PLAYER, applying confidence -15 per rules. SAS without Wemby loses enormous edge; with Wemby they're a top-3 team. DEN missing Murray, Gordon, Braun, Hardaway Jr., Johnson — severely depleted. Jokic status: NOT on injury list — Jokic appears active. DEN with Jokic only vs SAS with/without Wemby creates uncertain matchup. DEN ML at 4.98 is interesting but Wemby Questionable complicates it. If Wemby plays, SAS is dominant; if he sits, DEN with Jokic has a shot. Cannot build bet thesis on Wemby being out (confidence -25 per rules). No reliable edge.

LAL ML 1.12 — outside target range. UTA ML 7.65 — extreme. LAL missing Doncic (OUT), Reaves (OUT), Hayes Questionable, LeBron Questionable. LAL record (52-29) inflated per skills. UTA confirmed tank (22-59, L10 1-9, L15 -37.4) — missing Collier, Filipowski, George, Harkless, JJJ, Kessler. UTA is a shell of a team. Spread: LAL -14.5 at 2.0 — within range, but LAL also missing stars (LeBron Questionable) and UTA is fully gutted. Cannot reliably assess cover with LeBron GTD and LAL franchise players missing. No pick.

rejected_games.match: Intuit Dome vs Golden State Warriors
rejected_games.reason: LAC ML 1.47 — outside target range. GSW ML 2.96 — within range. LAC stats unavailable (advanced stats missing). GSW tank-watch confirmed (37-44, L10 4-6, L15 -17.1). LAC missing Beal (OUT), Jackson (OUT), Leonard Questionable (ankle). GSW missing Butler (OUT), Moody (OUT), Cryer (OUT), Green Questionable. LAC advanced stats unavailable — skills rule: do not bet spreads or totals without advanced stats. GSW ML at 2.96 vs a LAC with missing stars and unavailable stats: GSW L15 -17.1 shows poor recent form even for a tank-watch team. Cannot back GSW confidently. No pick.

POR ML 1.08 — outside target range. SAC ML 10.70 — extreme. SAC confirmed tank (22-59, L15 -28.8). POR play-in motivated (41-40) and home. However POR ML 1.08 is outside the target range of 1.60-2.50. Spread: POR -16.5 at 1.96 — within range, but 16.5 is extreme. POR missing Lillard (OUT), Grant (OUT) — two key pieces. POR L15 +29.9 is strong but their star absences make 16.5 spread unreliable. Not enough confidence to draft spread with POR depleted and SAC at extreme odds.

late_rejections.reason: TOR -3.5 spread at 1.91 evaluated as late pick. TOR ML cancelled due to odds below floor. Spread has edge (L15 gap 31.8 pts, MIA cold fade) but quantity gate already used for Houston -6.5. Also game tips in ~26 min — very tight time window. No pick added.

late_rejections.match: New York Knicks vs Boston Celtics
late_rejections.reason: Jaylen Brown confirmed OUT (Tendinitis) — major new development. However BOS ML at 2.81 exceeds 2.50 ceiling; NYK ML 1.51 below 1.60 floor. NYK -5.5 spread at 1.96 evaluated: BOS L15 +34.6 vs NYK L15 +8.1 — Boston's remaining roster (Tatum etc.) still elite even without Brown. Insufficient confidence that NYK covers -5.5 vs a BOS team that outperforms NYK by 26.5 points in L15. No valid edge. Quantity gate also used.

late_rejections.match: Golden State Warriors vs Los Angeles Lakers
late_rejections.reason: Stephen Curry confirmed OUT (Management). LAL: Doncic OUT, Reaves OUT, Smart OUT, Hayes OUT. GS also missing Butler, Porzingis, Moody, Horford — extremely depleted. GS ML 1.74 in range but GS L15 -13.0 vs LAL L15 -11.4 — nearly identical poor metrics. Both teams severely compromised, effectively a coin flip between two depleted rosters. No clean edge meeting confidence ≥ 60. Quantity gate also used.

Haliburton still OUT (confirmed). IND also missing Nembhard, McConnell, Nesmith. BKN confirmed tank (20-59), Claxton OUT. IND ML 1.66 marginally in range but franchise player Haliburton absent severely limits IND's upside. BKN ML 2.40 but BKN is confirmed tank team — skills file cautions against backing tankers. Both teams bottom-tier depleted rosters, no reliable edge. Quantity gate also used.

late_rejections.reason: Game not on tonight's original slate reviewed by Scout. Portland ML 1.96 in valid range; Portland L15 +26.5 is strong; LAC L15 +12.5 also positive. picks.reasoning: IND at home vs locked-seed DET missing Duren. Home team covering large spread with opponent missing key big man and lacking playoff motivation. Pacers competitive at home.
Extreme L15 form divergence between ATL and MIA. MIA confirmed cold, ATL showing positive momentum. ML odds at 2.40 within target range. Value edge on Hawks outright win.

rejected.reason: BOS ML at 7.03 outside range 1.60-2.50; ORL ML at 1.14 outside range. BOS L15 +33.3 vs ORL L15 -3.1 — BOS genuinely superior but Tatum OUT, Brown OUT, Hauser Doubtful, Pritchard Doubtful, Vucevic Doubtful. BOS depleted roster makes any ML unreliable. ORL spread +12.5 at 2.04: ORL L15 -3.1, below-average recent form; no edge fading BOS spread when BOS roster is uncertain. No reliable pick available.

WAS confirmed full tank — Do NOT bet WAS to win. CLE ML 1.22 outside ML target range 1.60-2.50. CLE spread -9.5 at 1.88: CLE has Mitchell, Allen, Mobley, Harden all OUT — virtually entire core absent. CLE L15 -0.3 reflects depleted roster. O/U 245.5 shows extreme pricing (O:3.46/U:1.37) — anomalous line, avoid. No pick available.

rejected.reason: NYK ML 6.75 — all franchise players (Brunson, Towns, Anunoby, Hart) confirmed OUT via NBA official. NYK is severely depleted. CHO ML 1.15 outside target range 1.60-2.50. CHO spread -13.5 at 1.88 is within range but CHO L15 +26.5 vs NYK L15 +13.6 — gap of 13 pts favours CHO, but CHO is on a 2-game losing streak and 1.88 is below spread floor of 1.80 (exactly at boundary). NYK without stars makes this unusual — books pricing 13.5 spread with NYK fully gutted. No reliable ML pick. Spread insufficient confidence given CHO recent streak concern.

TOR ML 1.01 / BKN ML 32.0 — extreme line anomaly. TOR -23.5 spread at 1.95 within range but 23.5-point spread is too extreme to forecast reliably. BKN confirmed tank team (L15 -32.3) but extreme spreads carry unpredictable cover risk. Flagging ML as anomaly; spread not drafted due to extreme margin uncertainty.

rejected.reason: DAL ML 1.42 — outside target range 1.60-2.50. CHI ML 3.15 — within range. CHI L15 -36.7 vs DAL L15 -30.4 — both teams are bad in recent form; neither offers a positive edge. CHI confirmed tank-watch (31-50, L10 2-8). DAL confirmed tank (25-56). Multiple CHI players OUT (Buzelis, Collins, Giddey, Okoro, Richards). DAL missing Kyrie Irving, Lively, several Doubtfuls. No reliable edge betting on either tanking team.

HOU ML 1.14 — outside target range. MEM ML 7.07 — extreme. MEM confirmed tank (25-56, L10 1-9, L15 -56.4). HOU missing Durant, Sengun, VanVleet, Adams, Thompson, Smith Jr. — franchise duo absent. HOU L15 +33.9 but that is with a depleted roster signal. No reliable spread edge: HOU -12.5 at 1.88 with HOU fully depleted but MEM in extreme tank. Spread unreliable with multiple unknown starters.

rejected.match: Target Center vs New Orleans Pelicans
rejected.reason: MIN ML 1.39 — outside target range. NOP ML 3.31 — within range. MIN missing Edwards, Gobert, Randle, Conley, Dosunmu, Anderson, Hyland (all OUT) — virtually entire core absent. MIN L15 -2.9 reflects depleted state. NOP ML 3.31 vs a MIN without stars is interesting, but NOP (26-55, L10 1-9, L15 -31.0) is itself a tank-tier team in terrible recent form. Betting NOP over gutted MIN is betting one tanker over another. O/U 244.5: extreme pricing (O:3.46/U:1.37) — anomalous line. No reliable edge.

OKC ML 1.45 — outside target range 1.60-2.50. PHX ML 3.02 — within range. OKC confirmed to be missing SGA, Hartenstein, Caruso (all OUT per NBA official today). OKC without SGA and Hartenstein is significantly weaker. PHX L15 -0.6 is essentially flat; season NetRtg +1.0. PHX missing Booker (OUT), Brooks (OUT), Allen (OUT) — severely depleted. L15 OKC +42.8 vs PHX -0.6 even without stars shows OKC depth. PHX ML at 3.02 is tempting but PHX is also missing key players. Confidence insufficient to back PHX at 3.02 against even a depleted OKC with elite depth.

rejected.match: Frost Bank Center vs Denver Nuggets
rejected.reason: SAS ML 1.22 — outside target range. DEN ML 4.98 — within range. DEN L15 +30.1 and on W11 streak (53-28 overall). SAS L15 +46.2 — elite recent form and home. Victor Wembanyama Questionable (rib soreness) — FRANCHISE PLAYER, applying confidence -15 per rules. SAS without Wemby loses enormous edge; with Wemby they're a top-3 team. DEN missing Murray, Gordon, Braun, Hardaway Jr., Johnson — severely depleted. Jokic status: NOT on injury list — Jokic appears active. DEN with Jokic only vs SAS with/without Wemby creates uncertain matchup. DEN ML at 4.98 is interesting but Wemby Questionable complicates it. If Wemby plays, SAS is dominant; if he sits, DEN with Jokic has a shot. Cannot build bet thesis on Wemby being out (confidence -25 per rules). No reliable edge.

LAL ML 1.12 — outside target range. UTA ML 7.65 — extreme. LAL missing Doncic (OUT), Reaves (OUT), Hayes Questionable, LeBron Questionable. LAL record (52-29) inflated per skills. Spread: LAL -14.5 at 2.0 — within range, but LAL also missing stars (LeBron Questionable) and UTA is fully gutted. Cannot reliably assess cover with LeBron GTD and LAL franchise players missing. No pick.

POR ML 1.08 — outside target range. SAC ML 10.70 — extreme. SAC confirmed tank (22-59, L15 -28.8). POR play-in motivated (41-40) and home. However POR ML 1.08 is outside the target range of 1.60-2.50. Spread: POR -16.5 at 1.96 — within range, but 16.5 is extreme. POR missing Lillard (OUT), Grant (OUT) — two key pieces. POR L15 +29.9 is strong but their star absences make 16.5 spread unreliable. Not enough confidence to draft spread with POR depleted and SAC at extreme odds.

scout_report_data.report: NBA official injury feed confirmed (30 teams) — full confidence rules apply. Two picks drafted from a 15-game slate. Key theme: multiple games disqualified due to ML odds outside 1.60–2.50 target range (many blowout-expected matchups), and several games corrupted by mass franchise player absences (CLE, HOU, LAL, MIN, NYK, OKC all missing entire cores). Best edges found: IND +13.5 at home vs locked-seed DET missing Duren (spread pick); ATL ML at 2.40 backed by extreme L15 form divergence vs confirmed-cold MIA. Two line anomalies flagged (BKN/TOR extreme ML, WAS/CLE extreme O/U, NOP/MIN extreme O/U). Pace data available this session — O/U pace signals active but no total picks cleared confidence thresholds.
